C:\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\VM.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\VM.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\VM.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\VM.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o VM.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libVM.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\VM.dir\linkLibs.rsp
